default_opening_scene.description: Low rafters, the smell of pipe smoke. A fire crackles in the hearth. The door creaks open - someone has arrived.

opening_scenes.description: Low rafters, the smell of pipe smoke. A fire crackles in the hearth. The door creaks open - someone has arrived.
Morning mist parts as you push forward. Branches arch overhead. A wolf howls somewhere in the distance.
Salt air fills your lungs. Fishermen haul nets at the dock. A northern-flag ship sways in the harbor.

location_list.name: Harbor Town
location_list.description: A bustling port town where trade ships dock and merchants hawk their wares along crowded piers.

location_list.name: Mountain Hold
location_list.description: A dwarven stronghold carved into the mountainside, its great stone gates open to trade and travelers.

location_list.name: Forest Haven
location_list.description: An elven settlement hidden among ancient trees, with walkways strung between massive trunks.

location_list.name: Desert Outpost
location_list.description: A sun-scorched trading post at the edge of the great desert, shielded by sandstone walls.

location_list.name: Swamp Village
location_list.description: A cluster of stilt houses rising from murky waters, connected by rickety wooden walkways.

location_list.name: Plains Crossing
location_list.description: A crossroads town on the open plains where caravans converge and drovers rest their herds.

location_list.name: Coastal Fort
location_list.description: A fortified coastal settlement guarding the sea approach, its walls battered by salt winds.

location_list.name: Mining Camp
location_list.description: A rough settlement built around a productive mine, where prospectors and laborers seek fortune.

location_list.name: Temple Sanctuary
location_list.description: A holy settlement built around an ancient temple, attracting pilgrims and scholars.

location_list.name: Frontier Post
location_list.description: The last outpost of civilization before the untamed wilds, garrisoned by hardened soldiers.

location_list.name: River Port
location_list.description: A thriving river town where barges unload goods and fishermen mend their nets on muddy banks.

location_list.name: Hill Town
location_list.description: A terraced settlement climbing a steep hillside, its narrow streets winding between stone houses.

location_list.name: Lake Settlement
location_list.description: A peaceful lakeside town known for its clear waters and the ancient ruins visible beneath the surface.

location_list.name: Oasis Town
location_list.description: A verdant haven in the desert, its palm-shaded streets busy with travelers grateful for water and shade.

location_list.name: Cliff City
location_list.description: A dramatic city built into sheer cliff faces, connected by bridges and carved staircases.

location_list.name: Goblin Warren
location_list.description: A sprawling network of narrow tunnels and crude chambers infested with goblins and their traps.

location_list.name: Undead Crypt
location_list.description: Ancient burial chambers where the dead refuse to rest, their bones clattering in the darkness.

location_list.name: Dragon Lair
location_list.description: A vast cavern heaped with treasure, the air thick with the stench of sulfur and ancient power.

location_list.name: Lich Tower
location_list.description: A towering spire of dark stone crackling with necromantic energy, home to an undying sorcerer.

location_list.name: Bandit Hideout
location_list.description: A concealed cave system used by outlaws to stash loot and plan raids on passing caravans.

location_list.name: Shadow Temple
location_list.description: A temple consumed by darkness where cultists worship forbidden gods in blood-stained chambers.

location_list.name: Frost Cavern
location_list.description: An ice-locked cavern deep in the frozen north, where frost giants and ice elementals dwell.

location_list.name: Fire Pit
location_list.description: A volcanic rift descending into the earth, its chambers glowing red with rivers of molten rock.

location_list.name: Mind Flayer Lair
location_list.description: A pulsating alien cavern deep underground, its walls slick with mucus and psychic dread.

location_list.name: Demon Gate
location_list.description: A rift between planes where demonic energy seeps into the world through a shattered portal.

location_list.name: Ancient Tomb
location_list.description: A sealed tomb of a forgotten king, its corridors lined with deadly traps and priceless relics.

location_list.name: Cursed Mine
location_list.description: An abandoned mine where miners dug too deep, unleashing something terrible from below.

location_list.name: Crystal Cave
location_list.description: A glittering cavern filled with massive crystal formations that hum with arcane energy.

location_list.name: Bat Cave
location_list.description: A dark cave filled with the flutter of a thousand leathery wings and the stench of guano.

location_list.name: Spider Nest
location_list.description: Thick webs choke every passage in this cave, and countless eyes glitter in the darkness.

location_list.name: Bear Den
location_list.description: A shallow cave marked with deep claw gouges, littered with bones and berry-stained rocks.

location_list.name: Troll Cave
location_list.description: A foul-smelling cavern beneath a bridge where a troll hoards stolen goods and gnawed bones.

location_list.name: Ice Cave
location_list.description: A frozen cavern where icicles hang like daggers and ancient creatures lie preserved in glacial ice.

location_list.name: Mushroom Grotto
location_list.description: A warm, humid cave carpeted with bioluminescent fungi that cast an eerie blue-green glow.

location_list.name: Echo Chamber
location_list.description: A vast underground chamber where every sound reverberates endlessly, disorienting all who enter.

location_list.name: Deep Cave
location_list.description: A seemingly bottomless network of passages descending into the earth's darkest depths.

location_list.name: Limestone Cavern
location_list.description: A sprawling cavern of pale stone pillars and dripping formations, carved by millennia of water.

location_list.name: Elven Ruin
location_list.description: Graceful arches and shattered spires of an ancient elven city, slowly being reclaimed by the forest.

location_list.name: Dwarven Ruin
location_list.description: Collapsed halls of a once-mighty dwarven kingdom, its forges cold and its vaults breached.

location_list.name: Ancient Library
location_list.description: A crumbling repository of forbidden knowledge, its shelves still holding texts of immense power.

location_list.name: Fallen Temple
location_list.description: A once-holy temple toppled by war or catastrophe, its sanctum now defiled by dark forces.

location_list.name: Ruined Castle
location_list.description: The crumbling remains of a once-proud fortress, its battlements broken and its halls open to the sky.

location_list.name: Crumbled Bridge
location_list.description: The remains of a massive stone bridge spanning a gorge, its center collapsed into the river below.

location_list.name: Sunken City
location_list.description: A drowned city visible beneath shallow waters, its towers rising like fingers from the lake bed.

location_list.name: Broken Tower
location_list.description: A wizard's tower split asunder by a magical catastrophe, its upper floors floating in defiance of gravity.

location_list.name: Abandoned Fort
location_list.description: A military outpost left to decay after the last war, now shelter for squatters and wild animals.

location_list.name: Forgotten Shrine
location_list.description: A small roadside shrine to a god no one remembers, its offerings petrified and its prayers unanswered.

location_list.name: Forest Road
location_list.description: A winding dirt path through dense woodland, dappled with sunlight and echoing with birdsong.

location_list.name: Mountain Pass
location_list.description: A treacherous high-altitude trail through jagged peaks, buffeted by fierce winds and sudden storms.

location_list.name: Desert Crossing
location_list.description: An endless expanse of shifting sand dunes under a merciless sun, where mirages taunt the weary.

location_list.name: Swamp Trail
location_list.description: A half-submerged path through fetid marshland, where every step risks sinking into the mire.

location_list.name: River Crossing
location_list.description: A broad shallow stretch of river where travelers ford the waters, watched by creatures on both banks.

location_list.name: Coastal Cliffs
location_list.description: Dramatic sea cliffs pounded by waves, with narrow paths winding along the precipitous edge.

location_list.name: Alpine Meadow
location_list.description: A high mountain meadow carpeted with wildflowers, offering breathtaking views of the peaks.

location_list.name: Dark Forest
location_list.description: An ancient forest so dense that sunlight never reaches the floor, filled with unseen dangers.

location_list.name: Haunted Wood
location_list.description: A cursed woodland where the trees themselves seem alive with malice and ghostly lights flicker between trunks.

location_list.name: Volcanic Wastes
location_list.description: A blasted landscape of hardened lava flows and steaming fissures, the air thick with ash.

location_list.name: Frozen Tundra
location_list.description: An endless frozen plain swept by howling blizzards, where survival is the only victory.

location_list.name: Bamboo Grove
location_list.description: Tall bamboo stalks sway and creak in the wind, creating a maze of green corridors.

location_list.name: Savanna
location_list.description: Wide golden grasslands stretching to the horizon, dotted with acacia trees and roaming herds.

location_list.name: Jungle Trail
location_list.description: A narrow trail hacked through dense tropical jungle, alive with the calls of exotic creatures.

location_list.name: Moorland
location_list.description: Bleak, windswept heath stretching under grey skies, dotted with standing stones and peat bogs.

location_list.name: Healing Shrine
location_list.description: A serene shrine built around a natural spring said to cure any ailment, tended by gentle acolytes.

location_list.name: Warrior Shrine
location_list.description: A battle-scarred shrine honoring fallen heroes, surrounded by weapon racks and training grounds.

location_list.name: Mage Shrine
location_list.description: A tower of crystalline stone where mages commune with arcane forces and study the weave of magic.

location_list.name: Nature Shrine
location_list.description: A moss-covered stone circle in a forest clearing where druids gather to honor the old spirits.

location_list.name: Death Shrine
location_list.description: A somber shrine where the boundary between life and death thins, and spirits whisper to the living.

location_list.name: Sea Shrine
location_list.description: A salt-encrusted shrine on a rocky promontory where sailors pray for safe passage across the waters.

location_list.name: Sun Shrine
location_list.description: A gleaming golden shrine atop a hill, its polished surfaces blazing with reflected sunlight.

location_list.name: Moon Shrine
location_list.description: A silver shrine in a clearing that glows with pale light under the full moon, sacred to night worshippers.

location_list.name: Bandit Camp
location_list.description: A hidden camp of outlaws and cutthroats, concealed in dense brush with sentries watching every approach.

location_list.name: Hunter Camp
location_list.description: A well-organized camp of skilled hunters and trappers, surrounded by drying racks and animal pelts.

location_list.name: Merchant Camp
location_list.description: A temporary caravan camp where traveling merchants rest, trade, and repair their wagons.

location_list.name: Refugee Camp
location_list.description: A sprawling, desperate camp of displaced people driven from their homes by war or disaster.

location_list.name: Military Camp
location_list.description: An orderly encampment of soldiers preparing for battle, with drilling grounds and supply depots.

location_list.name: Nomad Camp
location_list.description: A colorful tent encampment of desert wanderers, their camels resting beside a rare water source.

location_list.name: Druid Grove
location_list.description: A sacred gathering place of druids, surrounded by ancient trees hung with charms and offerings.

location_list.name: Witch Camp
location_list.description: A secluded camp of hedge witches and potion brewers, their cauldrons bubbling over smoky fires.

location_list.name: Border Fort
location_list.description: A heavily fortified position on the kingdom's edge, constantly vigilant against incursion.

location_list.name: River Fort
location_list.description: A stronghold built to control a strategic river crossing, its walls rising from the water's edge.

location_list.name: Mountain Fort
location_list.description: An impregnable fortress perched on a mountain peak, accessible only by a single winding road.

location_list.name: Coastal Watchtower
location_list.description: A tall stone tower overlooking the sea, its beacon warning of approaching ships and storms.

location_list.name: Ruined Outpost
location_list.description: The remains of a frontier outpost destroyed in a past conflict, offering meager shelter.

location_list.name: Guard Tower
location_list.description: A lone watchtower manned by a small garrison, keeping watch over the surrounding countryside.

location_list.name: Siege Camp
location_list.description: A massive military encampment surrounding a besieged fortification, bristling with war machines.

location_list.name: Iron Mine
location_list.description: A productive iron mine with deep shafts and busy ore carts, the sound of picks echoing constantly.

location_list.name: Gold Mine
location_list.description: A heavily guarded gold mine where nuggets gleam in the torchlight and greed drives men deep underground.

location_list.name: Silver Mine
location_list.description: A silver mine known for its pure ore, its tunnels reinforced with ancient dwarven engineering.

location_list.name: Gem Mine
location_list.description: A deep mine where precious stones are carefully extracted from the rock, each gem worth a fortune.

location_list.name: Coal Mine
location_list.description: A grim coal mine where dust-blackened workers toil in narrow seams, feeding the forges above.

location_list.name: Mithral Mine
location_list.description: A legendary mine producing the rarest of metals, its location a closely guarded secret.

location_list.name: Abandoned Mine
location_list.description: A mine sealed years ago after a cave-in, now home to creatures that thrive in the darkness.

location_list.name: Flooded Mine
location_list.description: A mine that breached an underground aquifer, its lower levels now submerged in dark water.

location_list.name: Sacred Grove
location_list.description: An ancient grove of massive trees considered holy by druids, where the air hums with primal magic.

location_list.name: Fey Grove
location_list.description: A shimmering grove where the boundary between the mortal world and the fey realm grows thin.

location_list.name: Corrupted Grove
location_list.description: A once-beautiful grove poisoned by dark magic, its trees twisted and its waters black with corruption.

location_list.name: Ancient Grove
location_list.description: A grove of trees older than recorded history, their gnarled roots forming natural chambers below.

location_list.name: Herb Garden
location_list.description: A carefully tended garden of medicinal and magical plants, maintained by healers and alchemists.

location_list.name: Orchard
location_list.description: Neat rows of fruit trees heavy with seasonal bounty, tended by farmers and visited by birds.

location_list.name: Vineyard
location_list.description: Terraced hillsides covered in grapevines, producing wines renowned throughout the realm.

location_list.name: River Crossing
location_list.description: A busy town straddling a wide river, its stone bridge serving as the only crossing for leagues.

location_list.name: Highcliff Town
location_list.description: A windswept settlement perched atop dramatic sea cliffs, its stone buildings braced against coastal gales.

location_list.name: Oasis Market
location_list.description: A sprawling bazaar built around a desert oasis, where caravans converge to trade exotic goods.

location_list.name: Underground City
location_list.description: A vast subterranean city illuminated by phosphorescent fungi and crystal lanterns.

location_list.name: Island Port
location_list.description: A weathered port town on a volcanic island, its docks crowded with trading vessels and fishing boats.

location_list.name: Volcano Forge
location_list.description: A settlement of master smiths built at the base of an active volcano, harnessing its heat for their craft.

location_list.name: Ice Citadel
location_list.description: A fortress city sculpted from permanent ice, its crystalline walls shimmering under pale northern lights.

location_list.name: Sky Haven
location_list.description: A mountaintop settlement perched above the clouds, accessible only by treacherous switchback trails.

location_list.name: Fungal Hollow
location_list.description: A strange settlement built within enormous mushroom caps, home to reclusive herbalists and alchemists.

location_list.name: Crystal Spire
location_list.description: A gleaming town built around a massive natural crystal formation, attracting mages and gem traders.

location_list.name: Tide Pool Village
location_list.description: A coastal hamlet built into natural tide pools, its inhabitants living in rhythm with the sea.

location_list.name: Canyon Settlement
location_list.description: A narrow town built along the floor of a deep canyon, its buildings hugging the red rock walls.

location_list.name: Floating Market
location_list.description: A town of barges and pontoons lashed together on a great lake, constantly shifting with the currents.

location_list.name: Treetop City
location_list.description: A sprawling settlement built in the canopy of ancient trees, connected by swaying bridges.

location_list.name: Salt Flat Town
location_list.description: A desolate trading post on a blinding white salt flat, where salt merchants and prospectors gather.

location_list.name: Coral Town
location_list.description: A seaside settlement built from harvested coral, its pink and white structures gleaming in the sun.

location_list.name: Windmill Town
location_list.description: A breezy hilltop town crowned with dozens of creaking windmills that grind grain for the region.

location_list.name: Hot Springs Town
location_list.description: A resort settlement built around natural hot springs, attracting weary travelers and the infirm.

location_list.name: Quarry Town
location_list.description: A dusty settlement surrounding an enormous stone quarry, its workers carving blocks for distant cities.

location_list.name: Tundra Waste
location_list.description: A featureless expanse of frozen ground stretching to the horizon under grey, heavy skies.

location_list.name: Dense Jungle
location_list.description: Impenetrable walls of vegetation buzzing with insects, where sunlight barely reaches the forest floor.

location_list.name: Volcanic Ridge
location_list.description: A jagged ridge of cooling lava flows and steaming fissures, the air thick with sulfur.

location_list.name: Fetid Swamp
location_list.description: A reeking bog of stagnant water and rotting vegetation, where will-o-wisps dance above the mire.

location_list.name: Scorching Dunes
location_list.description: Endless rolling sand dunes under a merciless sun, where mirages trick the unwary traveler.

location_list.name: Whispering Woods
location_list.description: An ancient forest where the trees seem to murmur secrets, and the paths shift when unobserved.

location_list.name: Eagle Nest Peak
location_list.description: A windswept mountain summit where giant eagles nest among the crags and thin air steals breath.

location_list.name: Blighted Field
location_list.description: Once-fertile farmland now blackened and corrupted by dark magic, the soil crumbling to ash.

location_list.name: Cloud Bridge
location_list.description: A narrow natural stone arch spanning a bottomless chasm, wreathed in perpetual cloud cover.

location_list.name: Kelp Forest
location_list.description: A coastal shallows thick with towering kelp fronds, hiding creatures and shipwrecks in its depths.

location_list.name: Thornbriar Maze
location_list.description: An impenetrable hedge of thorny briars grown into a labyrinth by wild magic.

location_list.name: Ashen Wastes
location_list.description: A grey landscape of volcanic ash and cinder, dotted with the charred remains of a once-great forest.

location_list.name: Rope Bridge Pass
location_list.description: A series of fraying rope bridges connecting narrow mountain ledges above a roaring river gorge.

location_list.name: Frozen Lake
location_list.description: A vast lake sealed under thick ice, its surface cracked and groaning in the bitter cold.

location_list.name: Bamboo Thicket
location_list.description: A dense stand of towering bamboo that creaks and sways, concealing hidden trails and clearings.

location_list.name: Crystal Desert
location_list.description: A dazzling expanse of crystalline sand that refracts sunlight into blinding rainbows.

location_list.name: Mangrove Coast
location_list.description: A tangled coast of mangrove roots and brackish channels, teeming with crabs and wading birds.

location_list.name: Petrified Forest
location_list.description: Ancient trees turned to stone stand in silent rows, their mineral forms eerily lifelike.

location_list.name: Storm Coast
location_list.description: A battered coastline of jagged rocks and crashing waves, perpetually hammered by thunderstorms.

location_list.name: Wildflower Meadow
location_list.description: A peaceful rolling meadow blanketed in wildflowers, humming with bees under open skies.

location_list.name: Tar Pits
location_list.description: Bubbling pools of thick black tar that trap the unwary, surrounded by the bones of ancient beasts.

location_list.name: Misty Moor
location_list.description: A low-lying heath shrouded in perpetual mist, where the ground squelches underfoot and visibility fades.

location_list.name: Shipwreck Bay
location_list.description: A treacherous bay littered with the rotting hulls of wrecked ships, picked over by salvagers.

location_list.name: Plague Hollow
location_list.description: A sickly depression in the land where a magical plague has warped the vegetation into twisted forms.

location_list.name: Overgrown Temple
location_list.description: A crumbling jungle temple consumed by vines and roots, its inner chambers still holding ancient traps.

location_list.name: Underwater Temple
location_list.description: A submerged temple accessible through air-filled chambers, its halls patrolled by aquatic guardians.

location_list.name: Sky Ruins
location_list.description: The shattered remains of a floating citadel, its broken towers still hovering above the clouds.

location_list.name: Volcanic Cavern
location_list.description: A searing cave system carved by lava flows, its walls glowing orange with residual heat.

location_list.name: Shadow Crypt
location_list.description: A lightless crypt where shadows move of their own accord and the dead do not rest easy.

location_list.name: Clockwork Dungeon
location_list.description: An ancient complex of grinding gears and mechanical traps built by a long-dead artificer.

location_list.name: Flooded Catacombs
location_list.description: Partially submerged burial tunnels where murky water laps at carved stone coffins.

location_list.name: Ice Fortress
location_list.description: A fortress of enchanted ice that never melts, its corridors patrolled by frost-touched sentinels.

location_list.name: Spider Temple
location_list.description: A web-choked temple devoted to a spider deity, where enormous arachnids serve as priests and guards.

location_list.name: Bone Labyrinth
location_list.description: A twisting maze constructed entirely from the bones of countless creatures, humming with necromantic energy.

location_list.name: Sunken Archives
location_list.description: A partially submerged library of ancient lore, its waterlogged tomes still legible through preservation magic.

location_list.name: Minotaur Maze
location_list.description: A sprawling stone labyrinth built to contain a terrible beast, its walls etched with warning runes.

location_list.name: Plague Laboratory
location_list.description: An abandoned alchemical laboratory where a mad wizard attempted to weaponize disease.

location_list.name: Wind Tunnel
location_list.description: A natural cave system where howling winds create dangerous pressure differentials and razor-sharp gusts.

location_list.name: Serpent Den
location_list.description: A warm, humid cave complex infested with giant serpents and their ophidian cultist keepers.

location_list.name: Crystal Prison
location_list.description: A dungeon hewn from living crystal that grows to seal breaches, trapping prisoners for eternity.

location_list.name: Abyssal Rift
location_list.description: A yawning tear in reality that descends into a plane of darkness, where demonic whispers echo upward.

location_list.name: Fungal Depths
location_list.description: A deep cave system overtaken by enormous fungal growths that release hallucinogenic spores.

location_list.name: Storm Lighthouse
location_list.description: An abandoned lighthouse struck by perpetual lightning, its interior warped by electrical energy.

location_list.name: Titan Boneyard
location_list.description: The skeletal remains of a colossal titan, its ribcage forming cathedral-sized chambers.

location_list.name: Blood Pit
location_list.description: A sacrificial arena deep underground where dark cultists once conducted blood rites.

location_list.name: Drowned Gallery
location_list.description: An ornate palace gallery submerged beneath a lake, its paintings and tapestries preserved by enchantment.

location_list.name: Amber Cave
location_list.description: A cave whose walls are encased in translucent amber, preserving ancient insects and small creatures within.

location_list.name: Lava Tube
location_list.description: A long, cylindrical tunnel carved by ancient lava flows, its walls glazed smooth and glassy.

location_list.name: Ice Grotto
location_list.description: A cavern of perpetual ice formations, where frozen waterfalls gleam blue in the dim light.

location_list.name: Echo Cavern
location_list.description: A vast domed cavern where the slightest sound reverberates endlessly, disorienting intruders.

location_list.name: Glowworm Cave
location_list.description: A dark cave illuminated by thousands of bioluminescent glowworms clinging to the ceiling.

location_list.name: Wind Cave
location_list.description: A cave system where underground air currents create a constant breeze and eerie whistling sounds.

location_list.name: Bone Cave
location_list.description: A cave littered with the bones of countless creatures dragged here by a predator long gone.

location_list.name: Tide Cave
location_list.description: A sea cave that floods with each high tide, revealing hidden chambers when the water recedes.

location_list.name: Sulfur Cave
location_list.description: A cave reeking of sulfur with yellow-crusted walls and bubbling hot springs deep within.

location_list.name: Painted Cave
location_list.description: A cave adorned with ancient paintings depicting hunts, rituals, and strange celestial events.

location_list.name: Crystal Geode
location_list.description: An enormous geode chamber whose walls are lined with massive amethyst and quartz crystals.

location_list.name: Bat Cathedral
location_list.description: A vast cave with a cathedral-high ceiling, home to thousands of roosting bats that darken the air at dusk.

location_list.name: Underwater Cave
location_list.description: A flooded cave system accessible only by diving, with air pockets sustaining daring explorers.

location_list.name: Root Cave
location_list.description: A shallow cave threaded with the roots of an enormous tree, which pulse with faint green light.

location_list.name: Collapsed Colosseum
location_list.description: The half-buried remains of a massive arena where gladiators once fought beasts for cheering crowds.

location_list.name: Sunken Palace
location_list.description: A grand palace slowly sinking into a swamp, its marble halls now home to lizards and moss.

location_list.name: Shattered Spire
location_list.description: The remains of a wizard's tower snapped in half by some terrible force, its top section lying nearby.

location_list.name: Overgrown Fortress
location_list.description: A once-mighty fortress now swallowed by vegetation, its battlements wrapped in thick vines.

location_list.name: Desert Necropolis
location_list.description: A vast city of the dead half-buried in desert sand, its tomb-lined streets silent and watchful.

location_list.name: Frozen Monastery
location_list.description: A mountain monastery entombed in ice, its monks frozen in place during their final meditation.

location_list.name: War Camp Ruins
location_list.description: The remnants of a massive military encampment, its siege engines rotting and its trenches collapsing.

location_list.name: Flooded Village
location_list.description: A village drowned by a dam collapse, its rooftops and steeples jutting above murky water.

location_list.name: Burned Cathedral
location_list.description: A grand cathedral reduced to a charred shell, its stained glass shattered and its beams collapsed.

location_list.name: Giant Staircase
location_list.description: A colossal stone staircase built for beings far larger than humans, ascending into the clouds.

location_list.name: Cursed Village
location_list.description: An abandoned village where a curse froze time, meals still on tables and doors left ajar.

location_list.name: Bridge Ruin
location_list.description: The shattered remains of a once-magnificent bridge spanning a deep gorge, only its pillars still standing.

location_list.name: Clocktower Ruin
location_list.description: A toppled clocktower whose massive gears and springs lie scattered across a cobblestone square.

location_list.name: Observatory Ruin
location_list.description: A crumbling hilltop observatory with its dome cracked open, its telescopes still pointing skyward.

location_list.name: Aqueduct Ruin
location_list.description: The remains of a massive stone aqueduct stretching across a valley, most of its arches collapsed.

location_list.name: Bounty Hunter Camp
location_list.description: A well-organized camp of bounty hunters tracking a dangerous quarry, their wanted posters nailed to trees.

location_list.name: Smuggler Cove
location_list.description: A hidden cove used by smugglers to stash contraband, concealed behind a waterfall.

location_list.name: Mercenary Outpost
location_list.description: A fortified camp of sellswords for hire, their banner flying above a ring of sharpened stakes.

location_list.name: Hermit Camp
location_list.description: A solitary camp of a reclusive sage living in self-imposed exile, surrounded by strange totems.

location_list.name: Poacher Camp
location_list.description: A crude camp of illegal hunters, strewn with traps and pelts of rare creatures.

location_list.name: Cultist Camp
location_list.description: A secretive encampment of robed figures performing rituals around a dark altar.

location_list.name: Woodcutter Camp
location_list.description: A logging camp at the forest edge, the air filled with the sound of axes and falling timber.

location_list.name: Prospector Camp
location_list.description: A scattering of tents and sluice boxes along a stream where gold panners work dawn to dusk.

location_list.name: War Refugee Camp
location_list.description: A sprawling camp of displaced families fleeing conflict, its muddy paths lined with makeshift shelters.

location_list.name: Ranger Outpost
location_list.description: A well-hidden camp maintained by forest rangers to monitor threats in the deep wilderness.

location_list.name: Waterfall Shrine
location_list.description: A small shrine built behind a cascading waterfall, its stone altar perpetually misted with spray.

location_list.name: Mountain Temple
location_list.description: A remote temple perched on a mountain ledge, accessible only after a grueling climb.

location_list.name: Underwater Altar
location_list.description: A submerged stone altar in a clear pool, where offerings sink to appease an ancient water spirit.

location_list.name: Crossroads Shrine
location_list.description: A weathered shrine at a four-way crossroads, where travelers leave coins for safe passage.

location_list.name: Bone Shrine
location_list.description: A macabre shrine constructed from the bones of fallen warriors, tended by silent death priests.

location_list.name: Flame Altar
location_list.description: An altar of black stone where an eternal flame burns without fuel, sacred to fire worshippers.

location_list.name: Storm Shrine
location_list.description: A hilltop shrine struck by lightning so often its stones are fused into glass in places.

location_list.name: Ancestor Shrine
location_list.description: A family shrine where the spirits of honored ancestors are consulted through ancient rituals.

location_list.name: Moonwell Shrine
location_list.description: A circular pool that glows silver under moonlight, sacred to druids and night worshippers.

location_list.name: War Memorial
location_list.description: A solemn monument to fallen soldiers, its stone walls inscribed with thousands of names.

location_list.name: Copper Mine
location_list.description: A productive copper mine with green-stained walls and the ring of picks echoing from below.

location_list.name: Crystal Mine
location_list.description: A mine rich with magical crystals that hum with arcane energy, prized by mages and enchanters.

location_list.name: Salt Mine
location_list.description: A sprawling salt mine carved into white rock, its chambers glittering under torchlight.

location_list.name: Collapsed Shaft
location_list.description: An old mineshaft partially collapsed by a cave-in, its deeper tunnels sealed behind rubble.

location_list.name: Tin Mine
location_list.description: A modest tin mine whose output fuels the bronze trade, its tunnels narrow and well-supported.

location_list.name: Obsidian Mine
location_list.description: A mine carved into volcanic glass, where sharp-edged obsidian is extracted for weapons and ritual tools.

location_list.name: Jade Mine
location_list.description: A mine producing fine jade stone, guarded closely by the merchants who control its output.

location_list.name: Sulfur Mine
location_list.description: A pungent mine where yellow sulfur crystals are harvested for alchemical purposes.

location_list.name: Marble Quarry
location_list.description: An open-pit quarry producing fine white marble, its terraced walls gleaming in the sun.

location_list.name: Haunted Mine
location_list.description: An old mine where miners died in a collapse, their restless spirits still tapping at the walls.

location_list.name: Watchtower Fort
location_list.description: A tall watchtower fortification overlooking a strategic mountain pass, manned by vigilant sentries.

location_list.name: Cliff Fortress
location_list.description: A fortress built into a sheer cliff face, approachable only by a single narrow staircase.

location_list.name: Island Citadel
location_list.description: A fortified citadel on a small island, connected to the mainland by a causeway submerged at high tide.

location_list.name: River Bastion
location_list.description: A fortress controlling a major river crossing, its towers bristling with ballistae aimed at the water.

location_list.name: Sand Fortress
location_list.description: A desert stronghold of hardened sandstone, its walls constantly cleared of encroaching dunes.

location_list.name: Frozen Garrison
location_list.description: A frost-rimed garrison on the northern frontier, its soldiers enduring brutal winters to hold the line.

location_list.name: Jungle Stockade
location_list.description: A wooden stockade hacked from jungle timber, its walls constantly fighting back the encroaching vegetation.

location_list.name: Underground Bastion
location_list.description: A subterranean fortress guarding a critical passage through the underdark, carved from living rock.

location_list.name: Tower Keep
location_list.description: A solitary fortified tower standing at a crossroads, garrisoned by a small but determined force.

location_list.name: Lakeside Fort
location_list.description: A lakeside fortification whose water gate opens to allow patrol boats access to the calm waters.

location_list.name: Enchanted Grove
location_list.description: A grove humming with wild magic where the trees bloom in every season simultaneously.

location_list.name: Dead Grove
location_list.description: A grove of skeletal trees killed by blight, their bare branches clawing at the grey sky.

location_list.name: Fey Crossing
location_list.description: A grove where the boundary between the mortal world and the fey realm grows thin.

location_list.name: Cherry Grove
location_list.description: A tranquil grove of cherry trees whose pink blossoms drift endlessly on a gentle breeze.

location_list.name: Ghost Town Grove
location_list.description: An abandoned mining settlement slowly being reclaimed by nature, saplings growing through floorboards.

location_list.name: Willow Grove
location_list.description: A peaceful grove of weeping willows surrounding a still pond, their trailing branches forming curtains.

location_list.name: Mushroom Grove
location_list.description: A damp grove where enormous mushrooms tower overhead, their caps forming a spongy canopy.

location_list.name: Autumn Grove
location_list.description: A grove locked in perpetual autumn, its trees forever shedding golden and crimson leaves.

location_list.name: Petrified Grove
location_list.description: A grove of trees turned to stone by ancient magic, standing as eerie mineral monuments to a lost forest.

location_list.name: Singing Grove
location_list.description: A grove where the wind passing through hollow trees creates haunting melodies that change with the season.

location_list.name: Lamplighter Town
location_list.description: A fog-shrouded town where enchanted lanterns line every street, tended by a guild of lamplighters.

location_list.name: Razor Peaks
location_list.description: A range of impossibly sharp mountain peaks that slice through low clouds like jagged teeth.

location_list.name: Worm Tunnels
location_list.description: A network of smooth, circular tunnels bored through rock by enormous burrowing worms.

location_list.name: Sinkhole Cave
location_list.description: A cave system accessed through a sudden sinkhole in the earth, its entrance a gaping pit.

location_list.name: Thornwood Grove
location_list.description: A dense grove of thorn-covered trees that form natural barriers, sheltering rare plants within.

location_list.name: Sunlit Grove
location_list.description: A clearing where sunlight always seems to find its way through the canopy, warming a circle of ancient oaks.
